project.name: Tutoring Notes
project.goal: Help tutors quickly capture session notes and share clear, consistent updates with parents/students.

mustHave: Tutor can create a session note (date, student, topics covered, homework, next steps, optional attachments/links)
Parent/student can view recent session notes in a simple web view (read-only)
Tutor can send a session update email link to parent/student after a session
Simple landing page describing the product and pricing placeholder
In-app feedback/bug report link or button (per pipeline preferences)
niceToHave: Per-student goals and progress tags (e.g. Algebra, Reading comprehension)
Templates for common session note formats
outOfScope: Payments/Stripe in v1 (ok to add later)

users.who: Independent tutors who want to save time on parent updates, and parents/students who want visibility into progress.
useCases: Tutor writes a structured note immediately after a session in under 2 minutes
Parent receives an email with a link to the session summary and homework
Tutor reviews prior notes before the next session to stay consistent

constraints.hosting: Local-first for MVP. Deploy later when a target is configured.

reviewChecklist: Tutor can create, edit, and view session notes without friction
Parent/student view is clean and clearly shows topics, homework, and next steps
Email delivery flow works end-to-end (even if using a dev email transport initially)
Auth prevents unauthorized access to tutor/admin area
Feedback/bug report is discoverable in the UI
acceptanceCriteria: New note can be created in <2 minutes from a blank state
Parent view link does not require tutor login and only shows the intended student's notes
At least one automated test covers note creation and viewing
At least one automated test covers auth protection for admin routes
